title: Agent Runtime
description: A standardized explainer for the common tool-using agent runtime loop, mapped to Hermes Agent and OpenClaw source-shaped code examples.

loop.name: Platform input
loop.purpose: Normalize an external platform event into a stable runtime and session identity.

loop.name: Session hydration
loop.purpose: Build model-visible context from prompt text, message history, summaries, and memory.

loop.name: Agent loop
loop.purpose: Run the model turn, enforce stop policy, and continue while tool work remains.

loop.name: Tool dispatch
loop.purpose: Resolve requested tools, validate policy, execute calls, and return results to the loop.

loop.name: Persistence
loop.purpose: Append transcripts, tool results, summaries, and memory-bearing state for future turns.

hermes.runtimeSummary: Python gateway + AIAgent + tools.registry + SQLite session DB

openclaw.runtimeSummary: TypeScript ACP/session layer + CoreAgentHarness + agentLoop + JSONL session tree
